title: Why Tech CEOs Are Suddenly Pointing to AI for Massive Layoffs?
description: Major technology companies are increasingly linking mass job cuts to advances in artificial intelligence, signaling a shift in how executives frame workforce reductions. Once, corporate leaders leaned on phrases like “over-hiring,” “efficiency,” or “too many management layers” to explain layoffs. Today, the narrative is dominated by AI. title: When AI Remembers You Better Than You Remember Yourself
description: For years, artificial intelligence was framed as a productivity story.
